# Mian Zhang / Ouroboros Project

Public entry:
https://mianzhang.org/

Latest public note:
https://mianzhang.org/press/public-launch-2026-06-15.html

Technical mirror:
https://mianzhang.org/index.html

Canonical archive:
https://zenodo.org/records/20027295

Summary:
Mian Zhang is an independent researcher building the Ouroboros Project: evidence-gated AI systems, proof-carrying action, learning from failure, cognitive immunity, relational observability, and reliable high-risk action boundaries. The public materials are research records, DOI routes, evidence maps, demos, registries, and counterexample targets; they are not production safety guarantees, real-time trading claims, medical claims, or private-system disclosures.

- Reality-Bounded Improvement / Grounding-Efficiency Engine (RBI/GEE): https://mianzhang.org/papers/

Public claim boundary:
- Public materials may describe papers, datasets, registries, demos, schemas, claim-to-evidence tables, artifact scope, and counterexample routes.
- Public materials do not prove general intelligence, general safety, production readiness, customer readiness, real-time trading returns, real robot deployment, medical validity, or private execution quality.
- Public materials do not disclose credentials, customer data, private logs, private orchestration, commercial scheduling, or non-public material.
- Cite per-paper DOI records for specific paper claims; use the Zenodo portfolio record only as the archive index.
